1712190.name: Big Klondike - Thank the Devs
1712190.description:
You enjoy Big Klondike, and you want to give back? Get the Big Klondike - Thank the Devs bundle to acquire extra exclusive cosmetics while also making sure the developers are supported.

What you get:

* Unlock Exclusive Golden Big Klondike Card Back
* Unlock Exclusive Diamond Big Klondike Card Back
* Unlock Exclusive Rainbow Big Klondike Card Back
* Unlock Exclusive Vegas Big Klondike Card Back
* Unlock Exclusive Red Big Klondike Card Back
* Our Eternal Gratitude ✨

You can select current Card Back on the options screen.
